_comment: 工作日报配置示例 — 对应 generate_daily_report.py 的数据逻辑
output_filename: 天府市民云工作日报-城运中心{date}.docx

platform_dau.query: SELECT platform_dau FROM platform_daily_metrics WHERE stat_date = '{yesterday}'

dau_growth.query: SELECT (a.platform_dau - b.platform_dau) / b.platform_dau FROM platform_daily_metrics a JOIN platform_daily_metrics b ON b.stat_date = '{last_week}' WHERE a.stat_date = '{yesterday}'

new_register_users.query: SELECT new_register_users FROM platform_daily_metrics WHERE stat_date = '{yesterday}'

total_register_users.query: SELECT total_register_users FROM platform_daily_metrics WHERE stat_date = '{yesterday}'
